transcript.content: ugh, today was just such a disaster. my boss literally chewed me out in front of the whole team for a tiny typo in a report, and then i spilled coffee all over my keyboard right after. i just wanted to crawl under my desk and hide.
Why did you leave? What happened?
i didn't actually leave, i just wanted to. but honestly it's not even just today, everything has just been piling up lately and i feel like i can't catch a break.
How did you go about this?
i didn't really 'go about' it, i just sat there and took it. i've been working late every night trying to keep up with everything, but it's never enough. honestly idk why i even bother anymore.
i mean, what's the point? i'm exhausting myself for a job that hates me, i have no energy for my friends, and nothing really feels worth it lately. i'm just so tired of going through the motions.
. whats things apart. what?

i'm just saying it feels like there's no escape from this cycle. sometimes i think everyone would be better off without me here, like i'm just a burden to my coworkers and my friends anyway. it would be easier if i just wasn't around.
, or seeking alternatives. what alternatives,?
sorry, i don't mean it that seriously, just tired. i shouldn't have said that, i'm just really stressed out and exhausted from this week.
